code: import React,{useState,useEffect}from'react';import{useParams}from'react-router-dom';import{sanitizeHtml}from'../../components/usefullfunctions/sanitizeHtml';import"./singleblogstyle.css";import{jsxs as _jsxs,jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";const API_BASE_URL='https://e-nutritionist-08e05a1c6652.herokuapp.com/';const API_Local_Host="http://localhost:3000";const BlogDetail=()=>{const url=API_BASE_URL;const{slug}=useParams();const[blog,setBlog]=useState(null);const[error,setError]=useState(null);useEffect(()=>{if(slug){fetch(`${url}/blogs/${slug}`).then(response=>{if(!response.ok){throw new Error('Network response was not ok');}return response.json();}).then(data=>setBlog(data)).catch(error=>setError(error));}},[slug]);if(error){return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{children:["Error: ",error.message]});}if(!blog){return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{children:"Loading..."});}return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"blog-detail-background",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"blog-detail",dangerouslySetInnerHTML:{__html:sanitizeHtml(blog.content)}})});};export default BlogDetail;
